hook.summary: A hand connects 3D shorts to torsos using a string.
hook.visual_action: A hand with red nails pulls a yellow string to match colorful shorts with white torsos in a grid.

scene_flow: Hand initiates a connection between a white torso and striped shorts.
Multiple pairs of shorts are connected to torsos in a grid layout.
The hand rapidly matches different color patterns across the screen.
The final pair is matched, completing the set with a satisfying visual snap.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy satisfying, tactile sorting and matching puzzles.
